goal: Harden the local P0 support.received event pipeline so the Super Chat fixture endpoint and internal support.received input use the same downstream side-effect path without real YouTube API, real OAuth, real DB, DB driver dependency, package or lockfile changes, contracts changes, migrations, or readiness/compliance claims.
doneCriteria: internal/events support.received approved event applies affinity once
internal/events support.received approved event enqueues reaction once
internal/events support.received approved event enqueues overlay once
internal/events support.received approved event enqueues outbox jobs once
internal/events duplicate support.received does not double-apply affinity
internal/events duplicate support.received does not double-enqueue reaction
internal/events moderation hold does not enqueue reaction or overlay
Super Chat fixture endpoint still passes existing P0 tests
admin tips list includes events from internal event path
no real YouTube API or DB use
